microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end **AI platform strategy** for an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining agent orchestration workflows, self-service scheduling, and a centralized tools layer that reduced operational toil by **30%** and scaled to 45+ annual enterprise drills.

Built and shipped an **AI agent** for drill planning, redesigning orchestration and session management workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and expand drill capacity by 21% — establishing a new foundation for intelligent, context-aware automation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring audit controls and human-in-the-loop oversight.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — by driving platform architecture decisions across distributed infrastructure and partner integrations.

Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing patterns and governance models across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp to drive $14M+ in enterprise business impact.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI platform adoption** for LLM-powered code generation workflows, conducting user demos and structured interviews that drove utilization across 14 enterprise teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ user research sessions with Azure service teams, surfacing critical agent capability gaps and establishing shared feature standards.

Accelerated AI-powered retrieval by implementing metadata governance standards and migrating documentation to a **semantic search platform**, reducing lookup time by 83% and improving context quality for downstream LLM workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, establishing shared standards across 140+ teams — a model for platform-wide consistency.

Drove product discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and deliver a **scalable, self-service** execution model.

Engineered a **Power BI instrumentation dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact platform investments with data-driven precision.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **OS migration platform strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — demonstrating enterprise-grade execution with auditability and risk controls.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and establishing a repeatable release framework for distributed systems.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets, applying a **data-driven iteration** approach that stabilized the developer intake process and unblocked critical platform delivery.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer lifecycle — scoping, invoicing, and CRM workflows — across 200+ monthly proposals, applying platform-consistency principles to a fragmented sales operation.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven, digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search touchpoints through rapid iteration and feedback loops.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, delivering a quantitative framework that informed future product and pricing strategy.
